text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, January 27. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Looking over our mortgage options. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Refinancing is a great leverage point. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Researching rover power systems in depth. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need scheduling portal immediately. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I've noted that. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Managing some allergy issues today. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Staying active is key. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. First United Mortgage offered 5.5% with zero points. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. A rate of 5.5% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. School projects are fun. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Got it, Mike. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Sleep quality is so important. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: I'm reviewing the scheduling portal specs for Vertex Health. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /appointment/notify under load. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Good focus area. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /appointment/notify. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Busy day at Vertex Health. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
